---
title: "Vegetation Data QA/QC"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
  region: "Central Alberta"  # used to filter region-appropriate species expectations
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(here)
```

## Load ingested data and reference tables

```{r load}
veg <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_ingested.rds")))
load(here("data", "wetland_indicator_status.rda"))
load(here("data", "invasive_species.rda"))
load(here("data", "anpc_wetland_species.rda"))
```

## Flag: unrecognised species codes

```{r flag-species}
known_species <- bind_rows(
  wetland_indicator_status |> select(species_code),
  anpc_wetland_species     |> select(species_code)
) |> distinct()

veg_flag_species <- veg |>
  anti_join(known_species, by = "species_code") |>
  mutate(flag = "UNRECOGNISED_SPECIES")

veg_flag_species
```

## Flag: cover values outside expected range (0–100%)

```{r flag-cover}
veg_flag_cover <- veg |>
  filter(!between(cover_pct, 0, 100)) |>
  mutate(flag = "COVER_OUT_OF_RANGE")

veg_flag_cover
```

## Flag: unexpected species for region

```{r flag-region}
# TODO: build region-to-expected-species lookup in reference data
# Placeholder — cross-reference nrc_geography with known regional flora
```

## Flag: missing required fields

```{r flag-missing}
required_fields <- c("plot_id", "species_code", "cover_pct", "stratum")

veg_flag_missing <- veg |>
  filter(if_any(all_of(required_fields), is.na)) |>
  mutate(flag = "MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD")

veg_flag_missing
```

## QA/QC summary

```{r summary}
all_flags <- bind_rows(veg_flag_species, veg_flag_cover, veg_flag_missing)

cat("Total records:", nrow(veg), "\n")
cat("Flagged records:", nrow(all_flags), "\n")
cat("Flags by type:\n")
print(table(all_flags$flag))
```

## Save QA/QC report and clean data

```{r save}
veg_clean <- veg |>
  anti_join(all_flags, by = names(veg))   # exclude flagged rows for downstream

saveRDS(veg_clean,  here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_clean.rds")))
write.csv(all_flags, here("data-raw",  paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_flags.csv")), row.names = FALSE)
```
